recommendations.title: Use under-first model
recommendations.action: Separate UNDER and OVER scoring/staking. Do not use one symmetric score.

recommendations.title: Keep only strong over 20.5 exposure
recommendations.action: Over 20.5 can stay. Cap over stake and avoid 1u.

recommendations.title: Reduce over 21.5
recommendations.action: Require stronger filters or remove from public.

recommendations.title: Remove or ultra-filter over 22.5
recommendations.action: Avoid public over 22.5 unless there is future proof.

recommendations.title: Confidence is not linear
recommendations.action: Do not increase stake linearly with confidence. Keep Profile C+ style.

recommendations.title: Use under edge >= 0.10 as boost
recommendations.action: Edge >= 0.10 should boost under stake, but not be universal filter.

recommendations.title: Do not boost over high edge
recommendations.action: High over edge may mean market correctly doubts over. Cap or remove.
